results.rendered_html:
rugṇa p. p. [ruj-kta]
1 Broken, shattered.
2 Thwarted.
3 Bent, curved.
4 Injured, hurt.
5 Diseased, sick; (see ruj).
Comp.
— raya a. checked in an onset, foiled in an attack.
